WISP.data 1.0.0
  • Reference
    • Example of WISP.data functions

WISP.data: Managing WISPstation Hyperspectral Data

Source: R/WISP.data-package.R
WISP.data-package.Rd

R package designed to automate the acquisition, quality control, analysis, and visualization of spectral data collected by the WISPstation fixed spectroradiometer.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data

  • https://oggioniale.github.io/WISP.data/

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/issues
